# GENERATED by devcontainer-egress/sync.sh — DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE.
# Effective allowlist = base-allowlist.txt + Brain/allowlist.extra.txt
# Edit the base (devcontainer-egress/base-allowlist.txt) or this project's
# allowlist.extra.txt, then re-run ./sync.sh and rebuild the container.

# ==== shared base ====
# BASE egress allowlist — the hosts EVERY agent devcontainer needs.
# One host per line; a leading dot matches the domain and all subdomains.
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored by squid.
#
# This is the shared floor. Per-project additions live in each project's
# .devcontainer/allowlist.extra.txt; `sync.sh` concatenates base + extra into
# the baked .devcontainer/allowlist.txt. Keep this MINIMAL — anything added here
# widens egress for all six containers (Brain, Vision, Watchman, Napoleon-relay,
# git-agent, sandbox). The generic sandbox keeps its dev floor (npm/PyPI) in its OWN
# allowlist.extra.txt, NOT here, so the others stay tight.

# Anthropic / Claude Code — the LLM API + auth/token refresh.
api.anthropic.com
console.anthropic.com

# GitHub — git over HTTPS (push/fetch), the REST/GraphQL API (gh), codeload and
# the raw/content CDN. Needed by every container (git/gh and package installs).
github.com
api.github.com
codeload.github.com
.githubusercontent.com

# ==== Brain project-specific extras ====
# Brain project-specific egress extras (merged onto base-allowlist.txt by
# devcontainer-egress/sync.sh into the baked allowlist.txt).
#
# NOT here on purpose:
#   - ollama.com / registry.ollama.ai — the host-Ollama hole was removed in the
#     apple/container migration; no in-container inference reaches a host daemon.
#   - huggingface.co — qmd's embedding models are seeded from the host cache, so
#     they are never downloaded. Add huggingface.co + cdn-lfs.huggingface.co and
#     rebuild only if you switch to in-container `qmd embed` downloads.

# Anthropic / Claude Code (auth, auto-updater, docs beyond the base API).
platform.claude.com
claude.ai
code.claude.com
docs.claude.com
downloads.claude.ai

# npm (installs qmd / safe-chain at runtime)
registry.npmjs.org

# OSV vulnerability database API (fleet-health scan project, task T1: lockfile →
# advisory lookups only, query-only, no package downloads). Added 2026-06-29.
api.osv.dev

# GitHub container registry (releases / images).
ghcr.io
pkg-containers.githubusercontent.com

# safe-chain malware list (supply-chain screening of npm/pip installs)
malware-list.aikido.dev

# Plugins: context7 MCP (npx @upstash/context7-mcp → context7 docs API)
context7.com
